narrative:
Dublin Twp township has 1,434 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.0 percentage points.
